basic_details.short_information: Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Guwahati (CARI Guwahati) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Senior Research Fellow (Pharmacology). The Walk-in on 20-06-2026. For detailed information please visit CARI Guwahati official website.

qualification.education_qualification: M.D. (Pharmacology), M.V.Sc. (Pharmacology), M. Pharm (Pharmacology), M.S.Pharm(Pharmacology), M. Pharm. (Ay.)/ M.Sc (Medicinal plants with specialization in Pharmacology with 02 years of research experience
